identity.name: Dino Inventory
identity.description: A minimalist yet playful inventory management system that balances professional efficiency with a friendly, pastel-infused aesthetic.

usage_rules: Use Pastel Green (#A8D5BA) for Primary Actions, Success States, and Brand Highlights.
Use Pastel Orange (#FFB380) for 'Pending' states, Alerts, and Secondary Accents.
Use Ink Black (#1A1A1A) for all Typography and Borders to maintain high contrast.
NEVER use gradients. Use flat, solid colors with subtle borders.
Backgrounds should be Soft Cream (#FAFAF9), not pure white.

areas.stats: col-span-full md:col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4

negocio_dashboard.structure: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8
negocio_dashboard.card_style: aspect-[4/5] flex flex-col justify-between p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl border-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold shadow-sm transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/20 text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/30 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-foreground/10 hover:border-foreground/30 bg-transparent rounded-full px-6 py-4

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer

inputs.style: bg-muted/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4

badges.pending: bg-secondary/30 text-orange-800 border border-secondary/50 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.completed: bg-primary/30 text-green-800 border border-primary/50 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

placeholders.description: Modern store interior with wooden ceiling

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css with the new color variables defined in 'colors.palette'.
3. USE 'Manrope' font for all headings and 'Public Sans' for body text.
4. IMPLEMENT the 'Depósito' dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid layout.
5. IMPLEMENT the 'Negocio' dashboard using the 'Tetris' grid layout for products.
6. ENSURE all buttons use the 'pill-shaped' rounded-full style.
7. USE the provided 'mascot_url' in the Header and Login page.
